items.claim: Alberto Montes is highly skilled and tricky on the ground.
items.quote: he's quite good on the ground and he's tricky on the ground

items.claim: Alberto Montes has a high proficiency for finishing fights with an anaconda choke.
items.quote: The submission of choice is an anaconda choke. Um, his last one is by Anaconda against Ricky Tersios. They called it a darts, but I'm pretty sure it was an anaconda. And prior to that, right, multiple Anaconda victories

items.claim: Tommy McMillan's best path to victory is on the feet.
items.quote: his best pathway has to be on the feet in this fight.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan is very hittable on the feet.
items.quote: McMillan is very hitable in the feed.

items.claim: Alberto Montes is not a high-level sniper or sharpshooter on the feet.
items.quote: I would not say Montes is again is a I don't want to say he's a sharp shooter on the feet.
